---
title: "Logistic ODE — WENDy ROOT vs IRLS"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(devtools)
library(deSolve)
library(ggplot2)
devtools::load_all()
```

## Problem setup

Logistic ODE: $\dot{u} = p_1 u - p_2 u^2$, true parameters $p^* = (1,\ 0.1)$.

```{r data}
f <- function(u, p, t) c(p[1] * u[1] - p[2] * u[1]^2)

p_star  <- c(1, 0.1)
u0      <- c(0.1)
npoints <- 128
t_span  <- c(0, 10)
tt      <- matrix(seq(t_span[1], t_span[2], length.out = npoints), ncol = 1)

modelODE <- function(tvec, state, parms) list(as.vector(f(state, parms, tvec)))
sol      <- deSolve::ode(y = u0, times = tt, func = modelODE, parms = p_star)
U_true   <- sol[, 2, drop = FALSE]

set.seed(42)
nr       <- 0.25
noise_sd <- nr * sqrt(mean(U_true^2))
U_noisy  <- U_true + matrix(rnorm(npoints, sd = noise_sd), ncol = 1)

cat(sprintf("n = %d   nr = %.2f   σ = %.4f\n", npoints, nr, noise_sd))
```

## Noisy data

```{r plot-data}
df_data <- data.frame(
  t     = as.vector(tt),
  true  = as.vector(U_true),
  noisy = as.vector(U_noisy)
)

ggplot(df_data, aes(x = t)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = noisy), colour = "grey60", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = true),  colour = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.9) +
  labs(title = sprintf("Logistic — noisy observations (nr = %.2f, n = %d)", nr, npoints),
       x = "Time", y = "u(t)") +
  theme_bw()
```

## Solve with ROOT and IRLS

```{r solve, message=FALSE}
res_root <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "ROOT")

res_irls <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "IRLS")

cat(sprintf("p* = [%s]\n",      paste(sprintf("%.4f", p_star),          collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("ROOT p̂ = [%s]  rel_err = %.4f\n",
            paste(sprintf("%.4f", res_root$phat), collapse = ", "),
            rel_err(res_root$phat, p_star)))
cat(sprintf("IRLS p̂ = [%s]  rel_err = %.4f\n",
            paste(sprintf("%.4f", res_irls$phat), collapse = ", "),
            rel_err(res_irls$phat, p_star)))
```

## Estimated state from WENDy ROOT

```{r plot-state}
U_root <- res_root$Uhat

df_state <- data.frame(
  t      = as.vector(tt),
  true   = as.vector(U_true),
  noisy  = as.vector(U_noisy),
  root   = as.vector(U_root)
)

ggplot(df_state, aes(x = t)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = noisy, colour = "Noisy data"),
             size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(aes(y = true,  colour = "True state"),  linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = root,  colour = "ROOT estimate"), linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Noisy data"    = "grey60",
                                 "True state"    = "steelblue",
                                 "ROOT estimate" = "firebrick")) +
  labs(title = "WENDy ROOT — estimated state",
       x = "Time", y = "u(t)", colour = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
